title: taraxacum stenospermum var. asturiense
intro: Taraxacum stenospermum var. asturiense, also known as the Asturian dandelion or Asturian burdock, is a rare and endemic variety of the dandelion plant native to the Asturias region in northern Spain. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing oxidative stress, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Taraxacum stenospermum var. asturiense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
